commands.test_subset: cargo test -p opengoose-types -p opengoose-profiles -p opengoose-persistence -p opengoose-projects
commands.test_full: cargo test --workspace (requires network for goose git dep + dbus for keyring)
commands.notes: Full workspace build requires: libxcb1-dev, libdbus-1-dev, pkg-config, network access for goose git dep. opengoose-web fails with v8 download error. sccache must be disabled (RUSTC_WRAPPER='') in sandbox.

testing_notes.note: PR #334 merged (AppEventKind tests: 92→102 types). Branch test-assist/session-export-render-2026-03-19 submitted as PR (3 new tests for session export render branches: None active_team, None author, non-empty batch). persistence: 293→296.

completed_work.description: Task 3: 3 tests added to opengoose-persistence/session_store/tests.rs for export render branches: None active_team, None author in message heading, non-empty batch render. Branch: test-assist/session-export-render-2026-03-19. persistence: 293→296 tests.
completed_work.pr_note: PR pending - branch pushed via safeoutputs

completed_work.description: PR #334 merged (AppEventKind: 10 tests for key(), source_gateway(), session_key(), Display). opengoose-types: 92→102 tests.
PR #331 merged (projects: absolute context-file path and tilde cwd expansion tests). opengoose-projects: 27→29 tests.
Task 3: 2 tests added to opengoose-projects: project_context_loads_file_by_absolute_path and resolve_cwd_with_tilde_prefix. Became PR #331.
Task 4: PR #324 merged by soilSpoon on 2026-03-16. Tests: persistence=293, Perf Improver PR #329 added count_runs_by_status tests.

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-core SessionManager - complex cache-DB consistency logic, no tests. Blocked by goose network dep.
opengoose-teams chain/router/fan_out executors - complex orchestration logic. Maintainer added dispatch.rs (OPE-533) and matrix incoming (OPE-536) tests — good momentum.
testing_backlog.notes: Cannot test in sandbox - needs network for goose dep

testing_backlog.item: Offline testable crates are well-covered - 525 tests total. Focus future runs on finding opportunities in network-dependent crates or wait for new features.
